text:
WORSENING_STG_4_PRSR_ULCRS_NUM M0800C Worsening Stage 4 Pressure Ulcers Number CHAR 1 The number of current stage 4 pressure ulcers that were not present or were at a lesser stage on admission. If no current pressure ulcer at a given stage, enter 0..
268 FAC_ID FAC_ID Facility ID CHAR 16
269 HGT_NUM HGT_NUM 25A Height Number CHAR 2 This column documents the patient's height (in inches) at admission. If measurement is X.1-X.4 round down, X.5 or greater round up
270 WT_NUM WT_NUM 26A Weight
